rationale: The proposed change to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amount has no relation to Educ. Code §11.168, which governs schooldistrict use of resources for off-site construction. No overlap or conflict exists.
quote: Sec. 11.168. USE OF DISTRICT RESOURCES PROHIBITED FOR CERTAIN PURPOSES; EXCEPTION.
_note: Rule text pertains to school district resource use for construction; proposed change concerns property tax homestead exemption amount. No conflict.
